Home.heroTitle: Master the Art of Strategic Resilience
Home.heroCopy: The world's most sophisticated repository of business and product failures. Decode the past to engineer a bulletproof future with proprietary AI insights.
Home.featuresCopy: Our platform provides the analytical depth required to navigate the complexities of modern entrepreneurship.

repository.title: Deep Repository
repository.desc: Every failure documented with forensic precision, covering finances, team dynamics, and market conditions.

analysis.title: Neural Analysis
analysis.desc: Our proprietary AI models extract non-obvious patterns from failure stories to provide predictive guidance.

mitigation.title: Risk Mitigation
mitigation.desc: Turn your current strategy into a stress-tested model using data from failures in your specific vertical.

Home.vision: The only real mistake is the one from which we learn nothing.

Explore.title: Explore Failures
Explore.description: Browse real-world failure cases and insights.
Explore.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, industry or category...
Explore.noResults: No failures found matching your search.
Explore.error: Failed to connect to backend. Error: {error}

Analyzer.title: AI <gradient>Analyzer</gradient>
Analyzer.description: Deconstruct venture failures using our proprietary neural forensic models. Identify patterns invisible to the human eye.
Analyzer.textareaPlaceholder: Describe the venture architecture, market conditions, and primary failure vectors...
Analyzer.systemProtocolDesc: By initiating this sequence, you acknowledge that the neural engine will perform high-intensity pattern matching across 40M+ data points. Results are deterministic and non-reversible.
Analyzer.awaitingUplinkDesc: Initialize deep forensic analysis by providing venture architecture in the primary input terminal.

Submit.title: Submit a Failure
Submit.description: Help the community learn by sharing a failure story you've analyzed.
Submit.caseInfoDesc: Provide the core details of the project or startup failure.
Submit.descPlaceholder: Describe what happened, the industry, the timeline, and the key reasons for failure...
Submit.successDesc: Thank you for contributing to the Failure Archive. Our team will review your submission and add it to the database shortly.

Login.title: Login
Login.description: Enter your email and password to access your account
Login.comingSoon: Login functionality is coming soon! For now, you can explore the database without an account.
